description_long: This is a single-story modern bungalow with a flat roof, surrounded by a green lawn and featuring a spacious backyard. The structure includes a large garage, multiple rooms with visible interior furnishings, and several windows distributed across the exterior walls. The backyard is equipped with a rectangular swimming pool, a circular outdoor dining table with chairs, and a small patio area. The main entrance is located at the front, adjacent to the garage, and there are clear pathways leading to the outdoor amenities. The walls are predominantly white, and the roof is flat, giving the building a contemporary appearance. The windows are arranged in a mostly asymmetrical pattern, providing natural light to the interior spaces.
description: A modern, single-story white bungalow with a flat roof, garage, and backyard featuring a pool and patio furniture. The design is contemporary with asymmetrical window placement and spacious outdoor areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the garage, main entrance, and a glimpse of the backyard pool and patio.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the backyard with the pool, circular table, and chairs, as well as the side wall with windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full backyard layout, including the pool, patio, and rear windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side entrance, additional windows, and interior room layout.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and rear windows
